title: To Vulcan.
content:
Thy sooty godhead I desire
    Still to be ready with thy fire;
    That should my book despised be,
    Acceptance it might find of thee.
meaning:
"To Vulcan." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
